name: Trusted HTML Behavior
summary: Attribute-based behavior that enforces Trusted Types policies on an element's innerHTML mutations.

syntax.description: Attribute placed on any element; an optional value names the Trusted Types policy to route through (default: "trusted-html").

fuiDemo.title: Trusted HTML Behavior — Trusted Types innerHTML enforcement

trustedTypes.usage: An attribute behaviour that enforces a Trusted Types policy on an element’s `innerHTML` mutations via `TrustedHTML`.
